title: Minimum Requirements — DNSH

assumptions.text: ETS benchmark applicability for LFP CAM requires formal verification by CFO team. If a fallback heat or fuel benchmark applies, contingency calculation using chemicals heat benchmark should be prepared.
Glucose used as carbon precursor is classified as a chemical input rather than a biomass energy feedstock under Renewable Energy Directive 2018/2001.

open_issues.text: Confirm with evaluator guidance that Section 3.4 'Manufacture of batteries' Table 2 status definitively exempts upstream CAM production from DNSH climate mitigation TSC.
Prepare contingency ETS benchmark calculation using chemicals heat benchmark as conservative fallback in case evaluator requests it.

evaluation_criterion: 2.3 — Quality of GHG emission avoidance calculation and minimum requirements (max 5, min pass 3)

compliance_status.ets_benchmark: likely not applicable — no benchmark product match; assumption pending verification
